description.content: Address search, reverse geocoding, and batch geocoding
Converts address text into geographic coordinates (forward geocoding). Returns a list of address candidates with location coordinates and match scores.

query.description: Single-line address string (e.g., "380 New York St, Redlands, CA 92373")
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 or alpha-3 country code
Comma-separated list of output fields (* for all)

description.content: Converts geographic coordinates to a readable address (reverse geocoding).

query.description: Distance in meters to search from the input location

description.content: Points of interest search and retrieval
Returns points of interest near a specified geographic location. Supports filtering by category, search radius, and pagination.

query.description: Comma-separated category IDs to filter results

description.content: Returns detailed attributes for a specific place including name, address, phone number, hours of operation, and category information.

query.description: Comma-separated list of attribute fields to return

description.content: Portal items, users, groups, and organizational management
Returns information about the organization's portal including available resources, helpers, and members. The response includes information about the portal's name, description, and thumbnail.
Returns the profile information of a specified user within the portal organization.

variable.description: (Required) Username of the ArcGIS Online user
(Required) Username of the ArcGIS Online user
(Required) Username of the ArcGIS Online user

description.content: Returns items owned by the specified user. Supports pagination, sorting, and filtering.

query.description: Index of the first entry in the result set (1-based)

description.content: Returns information about a specific portal item (map, layer, application, etc.).

variable.description: (Required) Unique identifier of the portal item
(Required) Unique identifier of the portal item
(Required) Unique identifier of the portal item

description.content: Searches for portal items, groups, and users using ArcGIS query syntax. Supports spatial, temporal, and attribute filtering.

query.description: (Required) Query string using ArcGIS search syntax (e.g., "type:Feature Service owner:jsmith")

description.content:
ESRI ArcGIS Platform REST API for sharing, managing, and accessing GIS content including feature services, maps, layers, users, and portal items. The API enables geospatial data management, spatial analysis, geocoding, routing, and organizational administration for ArcGIS Online and ArcGIS Enterprise deployments.

Contact Support:
 Name: ESRI Developer Support
